title: KOSMOS Permission v2 — Persistent Rule Store
description: Tri-state rule store at ~/.kosmos/permissions.json. Written by KOSMOS permission pipeline; externally editable with fail-closed validation on load (Continue.dev-inspired; stored as strict JSON — not YAML — to avoid PyYAML dependency).

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of last write. Informational only; not used for ordering.

rules.description: Ordered list of rules. Resolution order is narrower-scope-first at read time (session > project > user), not array order.

tool_id.description: Canonical adapter identifier (Spec 024 GovAPITool.tool_id). No wildcards — wildcard support is Deferred.

decision.description: Tri-state decision. 'deny' always wins across scopes. 'ask' is explicit 'no decision yet'.

scope.description: Rule scope. Only 'user' scope is persisted in this file. 'session' and 'project' are in-memory at runtime.

created_by_mode.description: The PermissionMode that produced this rule. Used by audit replay.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC expiry. Null = never expires.
